protocol.description: Logistic regression linear probe on frozen image embeddings. Top-1 accuracy and macro-F1. Stratified 80/20 train/test split per (dataset, attribute). Sparse classes (<5 samples) dropped.
protocol.feature_extractor: L2-normalized image embeddings (768-d) from vision encoder

hnm.status: SKIPPED — OOM during in-memory image decode of 30K PIL objects; scheduled as a follow-up with on-demand loading

summary.verdict: MODA-SigLIP-DF2 preserved attribute information (delta_acc within [-0.24%, +2.66%] across all probes) and slightly improved fine-grained color discrimination. Green-lights Recipe A' distillation — no need to add attribute-specific loss terms.
summary.dataset_independence: Recipe-X datasets verified 0-overlap with LookBench via MD5 audit (results/lookbench/data_leakage_check_v2.json).

followup.hnm_probe: To be run with on-demand image loading (DistillDataset-style lazy access) to avoid OOM on 30K PIL decode.
followup.target_attributes: Color from DF-InShop demonstrated DF2's gain; next probes: 'fabric' and 'pattern' from DF-MultiModal (if parseable) and H&M department codes.
